changes.description: Added PROJECTION_DISPOSITION_TABLE, GLYPH_EXEMPT_REASONS, verifyProjectionDisposition() function. Extended exports with verifyProjectionDisposition, PROJECTION_DISPOSITION_TABLE, DISPOSITION.
Extended exports with COGNITION_SLICE_VOCABULARY and MAP_CONDITION_KEYS (static Set of mapCondition switch cases).

Extended imports (CONDITION_VOCABULARY, CONDITION_INTERVENTIONS, COGNITION_SLICE_VOCABULARY, MAP_CONDITION_KEYS, CONDITION_NODES, verifyProjectionDisposition). Added disposition verification to handleVerificationInvoke. Added PROJECTION_DISPOSITION to VERIFICATION_STEP_NAMES. Added disposition summarization to summarizeStep. Added DispositionProof component and PROJECTION_DISPOSITION case to StepProofContent.
